Please generate a code to solve this task:

给你一个包含 `n` 个节点的有向带权图，节点编号从 `0` 到 `n - 1`。同时给你一个数组 `edges`，其中 `edges[i] = [ui, vi, wi]` 表示一条从节点 `ui` 到节点 `vi` 的有向边，其成本为 `wi`。



每个节点 `ui` 都有一个 **最多可使用一次** 的开关：当你到达 `ui` 且尚未使用其开关时，你可以对其一条入边 `vi` → `ui` 激活开关，将该边反转为 `ui` → `vi` 并 **立即** 穿过它。

反转仅对那一次移动有效，使用反转边的成本为 `2 * wi`。

返回从节点 `0` 到达节点 `n - 1` 的 **最小** 总成本。如果无法到达，则返回 -1。

 

**示例 1:**

**输入:** n = 4, edges = [[0,1,3],[3,1,1],[2,3,4],[0,2,2]]

**输出:** 5

**解释:**

**![img](https://assets.leetcode.com/uploads/2025/05/07/e1drawio.png)**

- 使用路径 `0 → 1` (成本 3)。
- 在节点 1，将原始边 `3 → 1` 反转为 `1 → 3` 并穿过它，成本为 `2 * 1 = 2`。
- 总成本为 `3 + 2 = 5`。

**示例 2:**

**输入:** n = 4, edges = [[0,2,1],[2,1,1],[1,3,1],[2,3,3]]

**输出:** 3

**解释:**

- 不需要反转。走路径 `0 → 2` (成本 1)，然后 `2 → 1` (成本 1)，再然后 `1 → 3` (成本 1)。
- 总成本为 `1 + 1 + 1 = 3`。

 

**提示:**

- `2 <= n <= 5 * 10**4`
- `1 <= edges.length <= 10**5`
- `edges[i] = [ui, vi, wi]`
- `0 <= ui, vi <= n - 1`
- `1 <= wi <= 1000`

```erlang
solve(N, Edges) ->
    % Build adjacency list
    Adj = build_adjacency(N, Edges),
    % Initialize priority queue and distance map
    InitialDist = maps:from_list([{{0, false}, 0}]),
    Q = [{0, {0, false}}],
    dijkstra(Q, InitialDist, N, Adj).

build_adjacency(N, Edges) ->
    Adj = lists:foldl(
        fun([U, V, W], Acc) ->
            maps:update_with(U, fun(List) -> [{V, W, false} | List] end, [{V, W, false}], Acc)
        end,
        maps:from_list([{I, []} || I <- lists:seq(0, N-1)]),
        Edges
    ),
    % Add reversed edges (marked as reversed)
    lists:foldl(
        fun([U, V, W], Acc) ->
            maps:update_with(V, fun(List) -> [{U, W, true} | List] end, [{U, W, true}], Acc)
        end,
        Adj,
        Edges
    ).

dijkstra([], _Dist, _N, _Adj) -> -1;
dijkstra([{Cost, {Node, Used}} | RestQ], Dist, N, Adj) ->
    if
        Node =:= N - 1 -> Cost;
        true ->
            Neighbors = maps:get(Node, Adj, []),
            {NewDist, NewQ} = process_neighbors(Neighbors, Node, Used, Cost, Dist, RestQ),
            dijkstra(NewQ, NewDist, N, Adj)
    end.

process_neighbors([], _Node, _Used, _Cost, Dist, Q) -> {Dist, Q};
process_neighbors([{V, W, IsReversed} | Rest], Node, Used, Cost, Dist, Q) ->
    NewCost = case IsReversed of
        true -> Cost + 2 * W;
        false -> Cost + W
    end,
    NewUsed = Used or IsReversed,
    Key = {V, NewUsed},
    case maps:find(Key, Dist) of
        {ok, OldCost} when NewCost < OldCost ->
            NewDist = maps:put(Key, NewCost, Dist),
            NewQ = insert_priority_queue(NewCost, Key, Q),
            process_neighbors(Rest, Node, Used, Cost, NewDist, NewQ);
        error ->
            NewDist = maps:put(Key, NewCost, Dist),
            NewQ = insert_priority_queue(NewCost, Key, Q),
            process_neighbors(Rest, Node, Used, Cost, NewDist, NewQ);
        _ ->
            process_neighbors(Rest, Node, Used, Cost, Dist, Q)
    end.

insert_priority_queue(Cost, Key, Q) ->
    insert_priority_queue(Cost, Key, Q, []).

insert_priority_queue(Cost, Key, [], Acc) ->
    lists:reverse([{Cost, Key} | Acc]);
insert_priority_queue(Cost, Key, [{C, _} = H | T], Acc) when C =< Cost ->
    insert_priority_queue(Cost, Key, T, [H | Acc]);
insert_priority_queue(Cost, Key, Rest, Acc) ->
    lists:reverse(Acc) ++ [{Cost, Key} | Rest].
```

solve(N, Edges) ->
    % Build adjacency list and reverse adjacency list
    Adj = maps:new(),
    RevAdj = maps:new(),
    {Adj1, RevAdj1} = lists:foldl(fun([U, V, W], {A, R}) ->
        A1 = maps:update_with(U, fun(L) -> [{V, W, false} | L] end, [{V, W, false}], A),
        R1 = maps:update_with(V, fun(L) -> [{U, W, true} | L] end, [{U, W, true}], R),
        {A1, R1}
    end, {Adj, RevAdj}, Edges),
    
    % Priority queue: {Cost, Node, UsedSwitch}
    PQ = [{0, 0, false}],
    % Distance map: {Node, UsedSwitch} -> Cost
    Dist = maps:put({0, false}, 0, maps:new()),
    
    dijkstra(PQ, Dist, Adj1, RevAdj1, N).

dijkstra([], _, _, _, N) -> -1;
dijkstra([{Cost, Node, Used} | Rest], Dist, Adj, RevAdj, N) ->
    if Node =:= N - 1 -> Cost;
       true ->
        % Get all outgoing edges (normal moves)
        OutEdges = maps:get(Node, Adj, []),
        % Get all incoming edges (potential switch moves if not used)
        InEdges = case Used of
            false -> maps:get(Node, RevAdj, []);
            true -> []
        end,
        
        % Process normal edges
        {NewDist, NewPQ} = lists:foldl(fun({V, W, _}, {D, Q}) ->
            Key = {V, Used},
            NewCost = Cost + W,
            case maps:get(Key, D, infinity) of
                infinity ->
                    D1 = maps:put(Key, NewCost, D),
                    Q1 = insert_priority_queue(Q, {NewCost, V, Used}),
                    {D1, Q1};
                ExistingCost when NewCost < ExistingCost ->
                    D1 = maps:put(Key, NewCost, D),
                    Q1 = insert_priority_queue(Q, {NewCost, V, Used}),
                    {D1, Q1};
                _ ->
                    {D, Q}
            end
        end, {Dist, Rest}, OutEdges),
        
        % Process switch edges if not used
        {FinalDist, FinalPQ} = case Used of
            false ->
                lists:foldl(fun({U, W, _}, {D, Q}) ->
                    Key = {U, true},
                    NewCost = Cost + 2 * W,
                    case maps:get(Key, D, infinity) of
                        infinity ->
                            D1 = maps:put(Key, NewCost, D),
                            Q1 = insert_priority_queue(Q, {NewCost, U, true}),
                            {D1, Q1};
                        ExistingCost when NewCost < ExistingCost ->
                            D1 = maps:put(Key, NewCost, D),
                            Q1 = insert_priority_queue(Q, {NewCost, U, true}),
                            {D1, Q1};
                        _ ->
                            {D, Q}
                    end
                end, {NewDist, NewPQ}, InEdges);
            true ->
                {NewDist, NewPQ}
        end,
        
        dijkstra(FinalPQ, FinalDist, Adj, RevAdj, N)
    end.

insert_priority_queue([], Elem) -> [Elem];
insert_priority_queue([H = {C, _, _} | T], Elem = {NewC, _, _}) ->
    if NewC < C -> [Elem, H | T];
       true -> [H | insert_priority_queue(T, Elem)]
    end.

solve(N, Edges) ->
    % Build adjacency lists for original and reversed edges
    Original = build_adj(N, Edges),
    Reversed = build_reversed_adj(N, Edges),
    
    % Priority queue: {Cost, Node, UsedFlip}
    % Visited: maps Node and UsedFlip to minimal cost
    PQ = [{0, 0, false}],
    Visited = #{},
    
    dijkstra(PQ, Visited, Original, Reversed, N).

build_adj(N, Edges) ->
    Adj = lists:foldl(
        fun([U, V, W], Acc) ->
            maps:update_with(U, fun(List) -> [{V, W} | List] end, [{V, W}], Acc)
        end,
        maps:from_list([{I, []} || I <- lists:seq(0, N-1)]),
        Edges
    ),
    Adj.

build_reversed_adj(N, Edges) ->
    ReversedAdj = lists:foldl(
        fun([U, V, W], Acc) ->
            maps:update_with(V, fun(List) -> [{U, W} | List] end, [{U, W}], Acc)
        end,
        maps:from_list([{I, []} || I <- lists:seq(0, N-1)]),
        Edges
    ),
    ReversedAdj.

dijkstra([], _, _, _, _) -> -1;
dijkstra([{Cost, Node, UsedFlip} | RestPQ], Visited, Original, Reversed, N) ->
    case Node =:= N - 1 of
        true -> Cost;
        false ->
            case maps:get({Node, UsedFlip}, Visited, infinity) of
                MinCost when Cost >= MinCost ->
                    dijkstra(RestPQ, Visited, Original, Reversed, N);
                _ ->
                    NewVisited = Visited#{{Node, UsedFlip} => Cost},
                    % Explore original edges
                    OriginalEdges = maps:get(Node, Original, []),
                    {PQ1, Visited1} = explore_edges(OriginalEdges, Cost, Node, UsedFlip, RestPQ, NewVisited, false),
                    % Explore reversed edges if flip is not used yet
                    case UsedFlip of
                        false ->
                            ReversedEdges = maps:get(Node, Reversed, []),
                            {PQ2, Visited2} = explore_edges(ReversedEdges, Cost, Node, true, PQ1, Visited1, true),
                            dijkstra(PQ2, Visited2, Original, Reversed, N);
                        true ->
                            dijkstra(PQ1, Visited1, Original, Reversed, N)
                    end
            end
    end.

explore_edges([], _, _, _, PQ, Visited, _) -> {PQ, Visited};
explore_edges([{V, W} | Edges], Cost, Node, UsedFlip, PQ, Visited, IsReversed) ->
    NewCost = case IsReversed of
        true -> Cost + 2 * W;
        false -> Cost + W
    end,
    Key = {V, UsedFlip},
    case maps:get(Key, Visited, infinity) > NewCost of
        true ->
            NewPQ = insert_priority_queue({NewCost, V, UsedFlip}, PQ),
            NewVisited = Visited#{Key => NewCost},
            explore_edges(Edges, Cost, Node, UsedFlip, NewPQ, NewVisited, IsReversed);
        false ->
            explore_edges(Edges, Cost, Node, UsedFlip, PQ, Visited, IsReversed)
    end.

insert_priority_queue(Item, []) -> [Item];
insert_priority_queue({Cost, _, _} = Item, [{HCost, _, _} | _] = PQ) when Cost =< HCost ->
    [Item | PQ];
insert_priority_queue(Item, [H | T]) ->
    [H | insert_priority_queue(Item, T)].

    % Build adjacency lists for original and reversed edges

solve(N, Edges) ->

        true -> Dist1

    case maps:get(Node, Original, []) of

solve(N, Edges) ->
    % Build adjacency list
    Adj = build_adjacency(N, Edges),
    % Priority queue: {Cost, Node, UsedFlip}
    PQ = [{0, 0, false}],
    % Visited: maps Node => {CostWithFlip, CostWithoutFlip}
    Visited = #{0 => {infinity, 0}},
    dijkstra(PQ, Visited, Adj, N).

build_adjacency(N, Edges) ->
    Adj = lists:foldl(
        fun([U, V, W], Acc) ->
            maps:update_with(U, fun(L) -> [{V, W, normal} | L] end, [{V, W, normal}], Acc)

        maps:from_list([{I, []} || I <- lists:seq(0, N-1)]),

                        {false, _} ->

solve(N, Edges) ->

    Adj = lists:foldl(fun([U, V, W], Acc) ->

solve(N, Edges) ->
    % Build adjacency lists for original and reversed edges
    Orig = build_adj(N, Edges),
    % For reversed edges, we need to know the original edge's weight
    Rev = build_rev_adj(N, Edges),
    
    % Priority queue: {Cost, Node, UsedSwitch}
    PQ = heap:new(),
    PQ1 = heap:in({0, 0, false}, PQ),
    
    % Distance matrix: distance[Node][UsedSwitch]
    Dist = array:new([{size, N}, {default, #{false => infinity, true => infinity}}]),
    Dist1 = array:set(0, #{false => 0, true => infinity}, Dist),

build_adj(N, Edges) ->
    Adj = array:new([{size, N}, {default, []}]),
    lists:foldl(fun([U, V, W], Acc) ->
        Neighbors = array:get(U, Acc),
        array:set(U, [{V, W} | Neighbors], Acc)
    end, Adj, Edges).

build_rev_adj(N, Edges) ->
    RevAdj = array:new([{size, N}, {default, []}]),
    lists:foldl(fun([U, V, W], Acc) ->
        Neighbors = array:get(V, Acc),
        array:set(V, [{U, W} | Neighbors], Acc)
    end, RevAdj, Edges).

dijkstra(Target, PQ, Dist, Orig, Rev) ->
    case heap:is_empty(PQ) of
        true -> -1;
        false ->
            {{Cost, Node, UsedSwitch}, PQ1} = heap:out(PQ),
            if Node =:= Target -> Cost;
               true ->
                CurrentDist = array:get(Node, Dist),
                case maps:get(UsedSwitch, CurrentDist) of
                    D when D < Cost -> dijkstra(Target, PQ1, Dist, Orig, Rev);
                    _ ->
                        % Process original edges
                        NewPQ = process_edges(Node, UsedSwitch, Cost, Orig, Dist, PQ1, false),
                        % Process reversed edges if switch hasn't been used yet
                        case UsedSwitch of
                            false ->
                                NewPQ1 = process_edges(Node, true, Cost, Rev, Dist, NewPQ, true),
                                dijkstra(Target, NewPQ1, Dist, Orig, Rev);
                            true ->
                                dijkstra(Target, NewPQ, Dist, Orig, Rev)
                        end
                end
            end
    end.

process_edges(Node, UsedSwitch, Cost, Adj, Dist, PQ, IsReversed) ->
    Neighbors = array:get(Node, Adj),
    lists:foldl(fun({V, W}, AccPQ) ->

    Adj = lists:foldl(fun([U, V, W], Acc) ->

solve(N, Edges) ->
    % Build adjacency lists for original and reversed edges
    Original = build_adj(N, Edges),
    Reversed = build_rev_adj(N, Edges),

build_adj(N, Edges) ->

            maps:update_with(U, fun(List) -> [{V, W} | List] end, [{V, W}], Acc)

build_rev_adj(N, Edges) ->

        end,

solve(N, Edges) ->
    % Build adjacency lists for original and reversed edges
    Original = build_adj(N, Edges, fun([U, V, W]) -> {U, V, W} end),
    Reversed = build_adj(N, Edges, fun([U, V, W]) -> {V, U, 2 * W} end),
    
    % Priority queue: {Cost, Node, UsedSwitch}
    PQ = [{0, 0, false}],

build_adj(N, Edges, Fun) ->
    Adj = lists:foldl(
        fun(Edge, Acc) ->
            {U, V, W} = Fun(Edge),
            maps:update_with(U, fun(List) -> [{V, W} | List] end, [{V, W}], Acc)
        end,
        maps:from_list([{I, []} || I <- lists:seq(0, N-1)]),
        Edges
    ),
    Adj.

dijkstra(N, Original, Reversed, PQ, Dist) ->
    case PQ of
        [] -> -1;
        [{Cost, Node, UsedSwitch} | RestPQ] ->
            if
                Node =:= N - 1 -> Cost;
                true ->
                    % Check if this is the best known distance
                    case maps:get({Node, UsedSwitch}, Dist, infinity) of
                        D when D < Cost -> 
                            dijkstra(N, Original, Reversed, RestPQ, Dist);
                        _ ->
                            % Process original edges
                            OriginalEdges = maps:get(Node, Original, []),
                            {PQ1, Dist1} = process_edges(OriginalEdges, Cost, Node, UsedSwitch, RestPQ, Dist),
                            
                            % Process reversed edges if switch hasn't been used
                            {PQ2, Dist2} =

                                        process_edges(ReversedEdges, Cost, Node, true, PQ1, Dist1);
                                    true ->
                                        {PQ1, Dist1}
                                end,
                            
                            dijkstra(N, Original, Reversed, PQ2, Dist2)
                    end
            end
    end.

process_edges(Edges, Cost, Node, UsedSwitch, PQ, Dist) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun({V, W}, {AccPQ, AccDist}) ->
            NewCost = Cost + W,
            Key = {V, UsedSwitch},
            case maps:get(Key, AccDist, infinity) of
                D when NewCost < D ->
                    NewPQ = insert_priority(NewCost, V, UsedSwitch, AccPQ),
                    NewDist = maps:put(Key, NewCost, AccDist),
                    {NewPQ, NewDist};

                    {AccPQ, AccDist}

        {PQ, Dist},
        Edges

insert_priority(Cost, Node, UsedSwitch, PQ) ->
    Item = {Cost, Node, UsedSwitch},

insert_sorted(Item, []) -> [Item];
insert_sorted(Item = {C, _, _}, [H = {CH, _, _} | T]) ->

给你一个包含 `n` 个节点的有向带权图，节点编号从 `0` 到 `n - 1`。同时给你一个数组 `edges`，其中 `edges[i] = [ui, vi, wi]` 表示一条从节点 `ui` 到节点 `vi` 的有向边，其成本为 `wi`。



每个节点 `ui` 都有一个 **最多可使用一次** 的开关：当你到达 `ui` 且尚未使用其开关时，你可以对其一条入边 `vi` → `ui` 激活开关，将该边反转为 `ui` → `vi` 并 **立即** 穿过它。

反转仅对那一次移动有效，使用反转边的成本为 `2 * wi`。

返回从节点 `0` 到达节点 `n - 1` 的 **最小** 总成本。如果无法到达，则返回 -1。

 

**示例 1:**

**输入:** n = 4, edges = [[0,1,3],[3,1,1],[2,3,4],[0,2,2]]

**输出:** 5

**解释:**

**![img](https://assets.leetcode.com/uploads/2025/05/07/e1drawio.png)**

- 使用路径 `0 → 1` (成本 3)。
- 在节点 1，将原始边 `3 → 1` 反转为 `1 → 3` 并穿过它，成本为 `2 * 1 = 2`。
- 总成本为 `3 + 2 = 5`。

**示例 2:**

**输入:** n = 4, edges = [[0,2,1],[2,1,1],[1,3,1],[2,3,3]]

**输出:** 3

**解释:**

- 不需要反转。走路径 `0 → 2` (成本 1)，然后 `2 → 1` (成本 1)，再然后 `1 → 3` (成本 1)。
- 总成本为 `1 + 1 + 1 = 3`。

 

**提示:**

- `2 <= n <= 5 * 10**4`
- `1 <= edges.length <= 10**5`
- `edges[i] = [ui, vi, wi]`
- `0 <= ui, vi <= n - 1`
- `1 <= wi <= 1000`

solve(N, Edges) ->
    % Build adjacency lists for original and reversed edges
    OrigAdj = build_adj(N, Edges, false),
    RevAdj = build_adj(N, Edges, true),
    
    % Priority queue: {Cost, Node, UsedSwitch}
    PQ = [{0, 0, false}],
    % Distance map: {Node, UsedSwitch} => Cost
    Dist = maps:from_list([{{0, false}, 0}, {{0, true}, infinity}]),
    
    dijkstra(PQ, Dist, OrigAdj, RevAdj, N).

build_adj(N, Edges, Reverse) ->
    Adj = lists:foldl(fun(_, Acc) -> Acc end, lists:duplicate(N, []), lists:seq(1, N)),
    lists:foldl(fun([U, V, W], Acc) ->
                        case Reverse of
                            false -> 
                                lists:keystore(U, 1, Acc, {U, [{V, W}|element(2, lists:keyfind(U, 1, Acc))]});
                            true -> 
                                lists:keystore(V, 1, Acc, {V, [{U, W}|element(2, lists:keyfind(V, 1, Acc))]})
                        end
                end, Adj, Edges).

dijkstra([], _, _, _, _) -> -1;
dijkstra([{Cost, Node, UsedSwitch}|Rest], Dist, OrigAdj, RevAdj, N) ->
    if 
        Node =:= N - 1 -> Cost;
        true ->
            NewPQ1 = explore_edges(Node, UsedSwitch, Cost, OrigAdj, Dist, Rest, false),
            case UsedSwitch of
                false ->
                    NewPQ2 = explore_edges(Node, true, Cost, RevAdj, Dist, NewPQ1, true),
                    dijkstra(NewPQ2, Dist, OrigAdj, RevAdj, N);
                true ->
                    dijkstra(NewPQ1, Dist, OrigAdj, RevAdj, N)
            end
    end.

explore_edges(Node, UsedSwitch, Cost, Adj, Dist, PQ, IsRev) ->
    Neighbors = element(2, lists:keyfind(Node, 1, Adj)),
    lists:foldl(fun({V, W}, AccPQ) ->
                        NewCost = case IsRev of

                                    true -> Cost + 2 * W
                                  end,
                        Key = {V, UsedSwitch orelse IsRev},
                        case maps:get(Key, Dist, infinity) > NewCost of
                            true ->
                                NewDist = maps:put(Key, NewCost, Dist),
                                [{NewCost, V, UsedSwitch orelse IsRev}|AccPQ];
                            false ->
                                AccPQ
                        end
                end, PQ, Neighbors).

    % Build adjacency list and reverse adjacency list
    Adj = lists:foldl(fun([U, V, W], Acc) ->

    case heap:is_empty(PQ) of

solve(N, Edges) ->
    % Build adjacency list and reverse adjacency list
    {Adj, RevAdj} = build_adj(N, Edges),
    
    % Priority queue: {Cost, Node, UsedFlip}
    % Visited: maps Node => {CostWithFlip, CostWithoutFlip}
    InitialPQ = [{0, 0, false}],
    InitialVisited = #{0 => {0, 0}},
    
    dijkstra(N, Adj, RevAdj, InitialPQ, InitialVisited).

build_adj(N, Edges) ->
    Adj = lists:foldl(
        fun([U, V, W], Acc) ->
            maps:update_with(U, fun(L) -> [{V, W, false} | L] end, [{V, W, false}], Acc)
        end, 
        maps:from_list([{I, []} || I <- lists:seq(0, N-1)]), 
        Edges
    ),
    RevAdj = lists:foldl(
        fun([U, V, W], Acc) ->
            maps:update_with(V, fun(L) -> [{U, W} | L] end, [{U, W}], Acc)
        end, 
        maps:from_list([{I, []} || I <- lists:seq(0, N-1)]), 
        Edges
    ),
    {Adj, RevAdj}.

dijkstra(N, Adj, RevAdj, PQ, Visited) ->
    case PQ of
        [] -> -1;
        [{Cost, Node, UsedFlip} | RestPQ] ->
            case Node =:= N - 1 of
                true -> Cost;
                false ->
                    case maps:get(Node, Visited) of
                        {MinCostWithFlip, MinCostWithoutFlip} ->
                            case (UsedFlip andalso Cost > MinCostWithFlip) orelse
                                 (not UsedFlip andalso Cost > MinCostWithoutFlip) of
                                true -> 
                                    dijkstra(N, Adj, RevAdj, RestPQ, Visited);
                                false ->
                                    % Process normal edges
                                    NormalEdges = maps:get(Node, Adj, []),
                                    {NewPQ1, NewVisited1} = process_edges(NormalEdges, Node, Cost, UsedFlip, RestPQ, Visited),
                                    
                                    % Process flipped edges if not used flip yet
                                    case not UsedFlip of
                                        true ->
                                            RevEdges = maps:get(Node, RevAdj, []),
                                            {NewPQ2, NewVisited2} = process_flipped_edges(RevEdges, Node, Cost, NewPQ1, NewVisited1),
                                            dijkstra(N, Adj, RevAdj, NewPQ2, NewVisited2);
                                        false ->
                                            dijkstra(N, Adj, RevAdj, NewPQ1, NewVisited1)
                                    end
                            end
                    end
            end
    end.

process_edges([], _Node, _Cost, _UsedFlip, PQ, Visited) ->
    {PQ, Visited};
process_edges([{V, W, _} | Edges], Node, Cost, UsedFlip, PQ, Visited) ->
    NewCost = Cost + W,
    case maps:get(V, Visited, {infinity, infinity}) of
        {MinCostWithFlip, MinCostWithoutFlip} ->
            case UsedFlip of
                true ->
                    if 
                        NewCost < MinCostWithFlip ->
                            NewVisited = Visited#{V => {NewCost, MinCostWithoutFlip}},
                            NewPQ = insert_priority_queue({NewCost, V, true}, PQ),
                            process_edges(Edges, Node, Cost, UsedFlip, NewPQ, NewVisited);
                        true ->
                            process_edges(Edges, Node, Cost, UsedFlip, PQ, Visited)
                    end;
                false ->
                    if
                        NewCost < MinCostWithoutFlip ->
                            NewVisited = Visited#{V => {MinCostWithFlip, NewCost}},
                            NewPQ = insert_priority_queue({NewCost, V, false}, PQ),
                            process_edges(Edges, Node, Cost, UsedFlip, NewPQ, NewVisited);
                        true ->
                            process_edges(Edges, Node, Cost, UsedFlip, PQ, Visited)
                    end
            end
    end.

process_flipped_edges([], _Node, _Cost, PQ, Visited) ->
    {PQ, Visited};
process_flipped_edges([{U, W} | Edges], Node, Cost, PQ, Visited) ->
    NewCost = Cost + 2 * W,
    case maps:get(U, Visited, {infinity, infinity}) of
        {MinCostWithFlip, MinCostWithoutFlip} ->
            if
                NewCost < MinCostWithFlip ->
                    NewVisited = Visited#{U => {NewCost, MinCostWithoutFlip}},
                    NewPQ = insert_priority_queue({NewCost, U, true}, PQ),
                    process_flipped_edges(Edges, Node, Cost, NewPQ, NewVisited);
                true ->
                    process_flipped_edges(Edges, Node, Cost, PQ, Visited)
            end
    end.

insert_priority_queue(Item, []) -> [Item];
insert_priority_queue({Cost, _, _} = Item, [{HCost, _, _} | _] = PQ) when Cost < HCost ->
    [Item | PQ];
insert_priority_queue(Item, [H | T]) ->
    [H | insert_priority_queue(Item, T)].

solve(N, Edges) ->
    % Build adjacency list and reverse adjacency list
    Adj = lists:foldl(fun([U, V, W], Acc) ->
                          maps:update_with(U, fun(L) -> [{V, W, false} | L] end, [{V, W, false}], Acc)

                            maps:update_with(V, fun(L) -> [{U, W, true} | L] end, [{U, W, true}], Acc)

    InitialPQ = [{0, 0, false}],
    % Distance map: {Node, UsedSwitch} => Cost

dijkstra(N, _Adj, _RevAdj, [], _Dist) ->
    -1;
dijkstra(N, Adj, RevAdj, [{Cost, U, UsedSwitch} | PQ], Dist) ->
    if
        U =:= N - 1 ->
            Cost;
        true ->
            % Get all outgoing edges (normal traversal)
            OutEdges = maps:get(U, Adj, []),
            % Get all incoming edges (potential switches)
            InEdges = case UsedSwitch of
                false -> maps:get(U, RevAdj, []);
                true -> []

                NewCost = Cost + W,

            % Process switch edges (if switch not used yet)
            {PQ2, Dist2} = case UsedSwitch of
                false ->
                    lists:foldl(fun({V, W, IsReversed}, {PQAcc, DistAcc}) ->
                        NewCost = Cost + 2 * W,
                        Key = {V, true},
                        case maps:get(Key, DistAcc, infinity) of
                            D when NewCost < D ->
                                NewDist = maps:put(Key, NewCost, DistAcc),
                                NewPQ = insert_sorted({NewCost, V, true}, PQAcc),
                                {NewPQ, NewDist};
                            _ ->

                        end
                    end, {PQ1, Dist1}, InEdges);

insert_sorted(Item = {Cost, _, _}, [H = {CostH, _, _} | T]) ->
